# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import type { VercelRequest, VercelResponse } from "@vercel/node";

export const config = {
  runtime: "edge",
};

type Body = {
  content?: unknown;
  headers?: Record<string, string>;
  status?: number;
  delayMsPerChunk?: number;
  chunkSize?: number;
  repeat?: number;
};

const encoder = new TextEncoder();

function sanitizeHeaders(input?: Record<string, string>): Headers {
  const out = new Headers();

  if (input) {
    for (const [kRaw, vRaw] of Object.entries(input)) {
      const k = String(kRaw).trim();
      const v = String(vRaw);

      if (!k) continue;

      const key = k.toLowerCase();
      if (key === "content-length") continue;
      if (key === "transfer-encoding") continue;
      if (key === "connection") continue;
      if (key === "keep-alive") continue;
      if (key === "upgrade") continue;
      if (key === "host") continue;

      try {
        out.set(k, v);
      } catch {
        // ignore invalid header names/values
      }
    }
  }

  if (!out.has("content-type")) out.set("content-type", "text/plain; charset=utf-8");
  if (!out.has("cache-control")) out.set("cache-control", "no-store");

  return out;
}

function toStringContent(content: unknown): string {
  if (content == null) return "";
  if (typeof content === "string") return content;
  if (typeof content === "number" || typeof content === "boolean" || typeof content === "bigint")
    return String(content);
  try {
    return JSON.stringify(content);
  } catch {
    return String(content);
  }
}

function splitIntoChunks(s: string, chunkSize: number): string[] {
  if (chunkSize <= 0) return [s];
  const chunks: string[] = [];
  for (let i = 0; i < s.length; i += chunkSize) chunks.push(s.slice(i, i + chunkSize));
  return chunks;
}

export default async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  if (req.method !== "POST") {
    return new Response("Method Not Allowed", { status: 405, headers: { allow: "POST" } });
  }

  let body: Body = {};
  try {
    body = (await req.json()) as Body;
  } catch {
    body = {};
  }

  const status =
    typeof body.status === "number" && body.status >= 100 && body.status <= 599 ? body.status : 200;

  const headers = sanitizeHeaders(body.headers);

  const text = toStringContent(body.content);
  const chunkSize = typeof body.chunkSize === "number" ? Math.max(1, Math.min(1024 * 1024, body.chunkSize)) : Math.min(8192, Math.max(1, text.length || 1));
  const repeat = typeof body.repeat === "number" ? Math.max(1, Math.min(10000, body.repeat)) : 1;
  const delayMsPerChunk =
    typeof body.delayMsPerChunk === "number" ? Math.max(0, Math.min(60_000, body.delayMsPerChunk)) : 0;

  const baseChunks = splitIntoChunks(text, chunkSize);

  const userStream = new ReadableStream<Uint8Array>({
    async start(controller) {
      try {
        for (let r = 0; r < repeat; r++) {
          for (const chunk of baseChunks) {
            if (delayMsPerChunk > 0) {
              await new Promise((res) => setTimeout(res, delayMsPerChunk));
            }
            controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(chunk));
          }
        }
      } finally {
        controller.close();
      }
    },
  });

  const { readable, writable } = new TransformStream<Uint8Array, Uint8Array>();
  userStream.pipeTo(writable).catch(() => {});

  return new Response(readable, { status, headers });
}
